strengths: Clean separation of concerns: realArtifactDeps for DB helpers, buildArtifactDownload for header shaping, both exported for unit test
getArtifact service method mirrors getCardOutput workspace-scoping pattern exactly
Both routes use requireAuth + requireWorkspaceMember matching the existing outputs endpoint pattern
TDD order preserved: all tests verified as passing before implementation

issues.description: buildArtifactDownload does not escape double-quote characters in filename for Content-Disposition header. Low risk since deriveFilename produces sanitized filenames, but a filename containing '"' would produce a malformed header.
